cover: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Salesforce Named Query API GA Summer 26'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Typed, Versioned SOQL Without String Bugs'. Subtitle 'API v64.0 named query contracts for enterprise integrations'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Typed parameters with braces icon', 'Versioned query contracts with git tag icon', 'No client-side SOQL strings with broken chain icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'String-built SOQL' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'Named Query API' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: const soql = 'SELECT Id, Name FROM Account WHERE Name = ' + input; right column green border '// GOOD' code: executeNamedQuery('AccountSearch', 'v1', { industry: 'Manufacturing', limitSize: 50 }); BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'API v64.0', 'WITH USER_MODE', 'Agentforce-safe tools'. Footer bar: 'Salesforce Named Query API GA Summer 26'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
images: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'The SOQL String Bug Named Query API Removes'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'String SOQL vs Named Query Contract'. Subtitle 'Summer 26 API v64.0 integration safety pattern'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Escaping bugs with broken quote icon', 'Field drift with schema icon', 'No version contract with warning icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'Middleware Owns SOQL' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'Salesforce Owns Query Contract' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: const soql = `SELECT Id, Name FROM Account WHERE Industry = '${industry}' LIMIT ${limitSize}`; right column green border '// GOOD' code: await executeNamedQuery('AccountSearch', 'v1', { industry: 'Manufacturing', limitSize: 50 }); BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'bind parameters', 'version response shape', 'centralize query review'. Footer bar: 'Do not make every consumer a SOQL author'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Named Query API Contract Testing'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Test Query Contracts Like APIs'. Subtitle 'Catch field drift before production'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Shape checks with brackets icon', 'Access checks with lock icon', 'Limit checks with gauge icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'No Contract Test' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'CI Contract Test' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: const records = await runQuery(soql); console.log(records[0].Customer_Tier__c); right column green border '// GOOD' code: assert isinstance(record['Owner']['Name'], str); assert len(records) <= 10; BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'v64.0 endpoint', 'seeded sandbox data', 'profile-based access tests'. Footer bar: 'Versioned SOQL deserves versioned tests'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
